visual_description: A man in a light blue shirt and tie sits in an office chair, looking down at an object in his hand. The view shifts to a close‑up of a hand holding a sealed plastic bag that contains a blood‑stained ID card bearing a photo of the same man, his name, rank and address. The background shows blurred office blinds and shelves.
audio_description: A quiet office ambience with the faint rustle of the plastic bag being handled.
